title: [CI:DOCS] minor man page cleanup
body:
Followup to #21285. I hope this is easier to review
than a re-push of that one.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
ongoing man page cleanup, maybe worth a broad release note but certainly not for just this PR
```
